sections.heading: Subsection (2) above is only relevant in a situation where the
sections.summary: Subsection (2) applies only if Arts Minister has not made a decision under that section. Commissioner must notify Arts Minister of loss of entitlement within 28 days if satisfied.

requirements.text: Commissioner must, within 28 days, give written notice to the Arts Minister about the loss of entitlement

sections.source_quote: If the Commissioner is satisfied of the matters set out in subsection (2), the Commissioner must, within 28 days, give written notice to the *Arts Minister about the loss of entitlement that has occurred under subsection (2).
